Δερματολογια – Πλαστικη Χειρουργικη Menu Hot Θεραπείες Καλέστε μας 210 6444 299 Κλείστε Ραντεβού Ζητήστε Βιντεοκλήση Menu EN EL Top θεραπείες BOTOX ΥΑΛΟΥΡΟΝΙΚΟ ΝΗΜΑΤΑ FRACTIONAL DERMAPEN ΜΕΣΟΘΕΡΑΠΕΙΑ ΛΙΠΟΔΙΑΛΥΣΗ ΚΥΤΤΑΡΙΤΙΔΑ ΘΕΛΩ ΕΝΗΜΕΡΩΤΙΚΟ ΡΑΝΤΕΒΟΥ Welcome to Derm & Plastic Surgery Clinics Ανακαλύψτε τον πιο όμορφο εαυτό σας! Η ομορφιά πηγάζει από την ψυχή μας και ενισχύεται από την αυτοπεποίθησή μας. Στις Κλινικές Derm & Plastic Surgery Clinics, αυτό επιβεβαιώνεται πολλές φορές μέσα στην ημέρα.Με τις πιο σύγχρονες αισθητικές θεραπείες για το πρόσωπο και το σώμα και με βαθιά γνώση των κανόνων ομορφιάς, σας βοηθάμε να τονώσετε την αυτοπεποίθησή σας και να ανακαλύψετε την πιο όμορφη εκδοχή του εαυτού σας.Εδώ θα βρίσκετε πάντα τις πιο εξελιγμένες μη επεμβατικές και επεμβατικές θεραπείες και τα τελευταίας τεχνολογίας μηχανήματα για να απολαμβάνετε μοναδικά αποτελέσματα με μέγιστη διάρκεια! Hot Θεραπείες Come as you are… Leave as you Wish! ΒΟΤΟΧ από 149€ Διάρκεια Θεραπείας15 λεπτά Διάρκεια ΑποτελέσματοςΑπό 4 - 6 μήνες Επίπεδο ΠόνουΑνώδυνο ΑναισθησίαΤοπική Αναισθησία ΤεχνικήΕνέσιμη Θεραπεία Εμφάνιση Αποτελέσματος5-7 ημέρες μετά Διάρκεια ΑποθεραπείαςΜηδενική ΥΑΛΟΥΡΟΝΙΚΟ από 149€ Διάρκεια Θεραπείας15 λεπτά Διάρκεια ΑποτελέσματοςΑπό 8 - 12 μήνες Επίπεδο ΠόνουΑνώδυνο ΑναισθησίαΤοπική Αναισθησία ΤεχνικήΕνέσιμη Θεραπεία Εμφάνιση ΑποτελέσματοςΑμέσως μετά Διάρκεια ΑποθεραπείαςΜηδενική ΝΗΜΑΤΑ από 100€ / για 10 νήματα Διάρκεια Θεραπείας15 - 30 λεπτά Διάρκεια ΑποτελέσματοςΑπό 1 - 2 χρόνια Επίπεδο ΠόνουΑνώδυνο ΑναισθησίαΤοπική Αναισθησία ΤεχνικήΑνώδυνη Εμφάνιση ΑποτελέσματοςΣε 1 μήνα Διάρκεια ΑποθεραπείαςΜηδενική ΛΙΠΟΛΥΣΗ από 129€ Διάρκεια Θεραπείας15 - 30 λεπτά Διάρκεια ΑποτελέσματοςΜόνιμο Επίπεδο ΠόνουΑνώδυνο ΑναισθησίαΤοπική Αναισθησία ΤεχνικήΕνέσιμη θεραπεία Εμφάνιση ΑποτελέσματοςΣε 1 μήνα Διάρκεια Αποθεραπείας1 εβδομάδα LASER ΑΠΟΤΡΙΧΩΣΗ από 10€ Διάρκεια Θεραπείας5 - 60 λεπτά Διάρκεια ΑποτελέσματοςΜόνιμο Επίπεδο ΠόνουΑνώδυνο ΑναισθησίαΔεν απαιτείται ΤεχνικήLaser θεραπεία Εμφάνιση ΑποτελέσματοςΣε 2 εβδομάδες Διάρκεια ΑποθεραπείαςΜηδενική FRACTIONAL LASER από 89€ Διάρκεια Θεραπείας30 λεπτά Διάρκεια Αποτελέσματος12 μήνες Επίπεδο ΠόνουΑπόλυτα Ανεκτό ΑναισθησίαΤοπική Κρέμα ΤεχνικήLaser Θεραπεία Εμφάνιση ΑποτελέσματοςΣε 1 εβδομάδα Διάρκεια Αποθεραπείας2 - 5 ημέρες Meet the Doctor Dr. Ζωγράφου Αγγελική MD MSc in Minimally Invasive Surgery, PhD in Plastic Surgery Σπούδασα Ιατρική στο Εθνικό Καποδιστριακό Πανεπιστήμιο Αθηνών, από όπου και αποφοίτησα με Άριστα και δυο υποτροφίες.Η αγάπη μου και το πάθος μου για την Πλαστική Χειρουργική, με οδήγησε σε δυο περαιτέρω εκπαιδεύσεις, το Μεταπτυχιακό μου Master στην Ελάχιστα Επεμβατική και Ρομποτική Χειρουργική, από το οποίο αποφοίτησα με Διάκριση και Άριστα και το Διδακτορικό μου στην Πλαστική Χειρουργική, από το οποίο επίσης αποφοίτησα με Διάκριση και Άριστα. ΔΙΑΒΑΣΤΕ ΠΕΡΙΣΣΟΤΕΡΑ Συνέχισα τις ιατρικές μου εξειδικεύσεις στην Αγγλία και συγκεκριμένα στο Πανεπιστήμιο της Οξφόρδης για 6 χρονια, με περαιτέρω εκπαίδευση στην Δερματολογια, την Δερματοχειρουργική και την MOHS Χειρουργική (εξειδικευμένη μέθοδο για την αφαίρεση των δερματικών καρκίνων). Κατόπιν συνέχισα για ένα χρόνο στην Αμερική, για εξειδίκευση στις σύγχρονες τεχνικές Μεταμόσχευσης Μαλλιών FUE, σε μια από τις κορυφαίες Κλινικές Μεταμόσχευσης Μαλλιών. Ακολούθως επέστρεψα στο Λονδίνο, όπου εργάστηκα για δύο χρόνια ως Διευθύντρια στην διάσημη Harley Street σε ιδιωτικές Κλινικές Πλαστικής Χειρουργικής και κατόπιν συνέχισα για δύο ακόμη χρόνια στην Ελβετία και συγκεκριμένα στην Ζυρίχη, ως Διευθύντρια σε κορυφαίες ιδιωτικές Κλινικές Πλαστικής Χειρουργικής.Η πολυετής παραμονή μου στο εξωτερικό, οι πολλαπλές εξειδικεύσεις μου, η επαφή μου με ασθενείς από όλο τον κόσμο και η επιθυμία μου να προσφέρω στην πατρίδα μου, μου έδωσαν τις βάσεις για να δημιουργήσω τις Κλινικές Derm & Plastic Surgery Clinic το 2018, οι οποίες είναι πρότυπες Κλινικές Πλαστικής Χειρουργικής & Αισθητικής Δερματολογίας. Από τότε μέχρι σήμερα δεν έχω σταματήσει στιγμή να επιδιώκω το καλύτερο, να επιμορφώνομαι συνεχώς, να αναζητώ την καινοτομία και να φροντίζω για την απόλυτη ασφάλεια της κάθε ιατρικής πράξης, μέχρι και στην τελευταία λεπτομέρεια.Εκτός από τις Κλινικές Derm & Plastic Surgery Clinic, είμαι Διευθύντρια του Τμήματος Mohs Χειρουργικής του Νοσοκομείου ΥΓΕΙΑ, καθώς είμαι η μοναδική πιστοποιημένη Mohs Χειρουργός στην Ελλάδα, αλλά και Διδάκτωρ του Πανεπιστημίου Αθηνών, εκπαιδεύοντας Φοιτητές Ιατρικής και Ειδικευόμενους Γιατρούς. Διαθέτω πάνω από 15 χρόνια διεθνούς ιατρικής εμπειρίας σε όλο το εύρος τόσο των επανορθωτικών, όσο και των αισθητικών χειρουργείων της Πλαστικής Χειρουργικής, της MOHS Χειρουργικής, της Δερματοχειρουργικής και της Μεταμόσχευσης Μαλλιών και έχω πραγματοποιήσει πάνω από 5.000 επεμβάσεις ως Πρώτος Χειρουργός σε Ελλάδα, Αγγλία, Ελβετία και Αμερική. Θα χαρώ να σας γνωρίσω, να σας εξυπηρετήσω και να μπορέσω να σας φανώ χρήσιμη. Δείτε Φωτογραφίες Πριν και Μετά Αποτελέσματα που μιλούν από μόνα τους! BOTOXΔείτε όλο το Gallery ΧΕΙΛΗΔείτε όλο το Gallery ΜΑΥΡΟΙ ΚΥΚΛΟΙΔείτε όλο το Gallery ΜΕΤΑΜΟΣΧΕΥΣΗ ΜΑΛΛΙΩΝΔείτε όλο το Gallery ΑΚΜΗΔείτε όλο το Gallery ΚΥΤΤΑΡΙΤΙΔΑΔείτε όλο το Gallery Υπηρεσίες Βρείτε την κατάλληλη για εσάς​ ΘΕΡΑΠΕΙΕΣΠΡΟΣΩΠΟΥ ΘΕΡΑΠΕΙΕΣΣΩΜΑΤΟΣ LASERΑΠΟΤΡΙΧΩΣΗ ΚΛΙΝΙΚΗΔΕΡΜΑΤΟΛΟΓΙΑ ΜΕΤΑΜΟΣΧΕΥΣΗΜΑΛΛΙΩΝ ΠΛΑΣΤΙΚΗΧΕΙΡΟΥΡΓΙΚΗ Derm & Plastic TV Όλα όσα πρέπει να γνωρίζετε! Απαντάμε στις πιο συχνές ερωτήσεις σας! Οι Κορυφαίες Θεραπείες των Κλινικών μας Γίνε η πιο όμορφη εκδοχή του εαυτού σου! Θεραπείες για Ρυτίδες Στις Κλινικές Derm & Plastic δεν αφήνουμε τον χρόνο να σας στεναχωρεί και να αφήνει τα σημάδια του στο πρόσωπο σας. Με θεραπείες Βοtοx, Υαλουρονικού Οξέος, Νήματα, Μεσοθεραπείες, Fractional Laser και Dermapen σταματάμε τον χρόνο και επαναφέρουμε την σφριγηλότητα και την νεανικότητα στο πρόσωπο και το σώμα σας. ΜΑΘΕΤΕ ΠΕΡΙΣΣΟΤΕΡΑ Θεραπείες για Δυσχρωμίες Στις Κλινικές Derm & Plastic θα βρείτε κορυφαίες θεραπείες που δρουν στοχευμένα στη στιβάδα του δέρματος, όπου βρίσκονται τα μελανοκύτταρα και σβήνουν κηλίδες, πανάδες και κάθε είδους δυσχρωμίες σε λίγες μόνο συνεδρίες.Με σύγχρονες αναπλαστικές μεθόδους, όπως το Fractional Laser, το Dermapen 4, η φωτοθεραπεία Dermalux και τα λευκαντικά nanopeelings, αποκαθιστούμε την λάμψη και την ομοιοχρωμία του δέρματος σας, χωρίς να μείνει πίσω κανένα σημάδι! ΜΑΘΕΤΕ ΠΕΡΙΣΣΟΤΕΡΑ Θεραπείες για Χαλάρωση - Σύσφιξη Κόντρα στον νόμο της βαρύτητας, εξελιγμένες αισθητικές θεραπείες μπορούν να προσφέρουν ορατή σύσφιξη προσώπου και να αποκαταστήσουν το νεανικό οβάλ περίγραμμά του.Με προηγμένης τεχνολογίας ιατρικές συσκευές, σύγχρονες μεθόδους και στοχευμένα ενεργά συστατικά, το πρόσωπό σας μπορεί να δείξει πολλά χρόνια νεότερο και το αποτέλεσμα αυτό να συντηρηθεί για πολύ καιρό. ΜΑΘΕΤΕ ΠΕΡΙΣΣΟΤΕΡΑ Θεραπείες για Ακμή - Ουλές Ακμής Σπυράκια, μαύρα στίγματα, κύστες, ουλές ακμής. Τα «πρόσωπα» της ακμής είναι πολλά και διαφορετικά σε κάθε ασθενή. Αυτό που είναι κοινό σε όλους, είναι το γεγονός ότι υπάρχουν θεραπείες για την ακμή που αντιμετωπίζουν τα συμπτώματα και προλαμβάνουν ή «σβήνουν» τις ουλές ακμής, ακόμη και τις παλιές. ΜΑΘΕΤΕ ΠΕΡΙΣΣΟΤΕΡΑ Θεραπείες για Τοπικό Πάχος Οι θεραπείες αυτές θα αλλάξουν θεαματικά το σχήμα του σώματος σας και θα εκτινάξουν στα ύψη την αυτοπεποίθηση σας. Μπορείτε πλέον να έχετε το σώμα που θέλετε με θεραπείες μη επεμβατικές, όπως η Ενέσιμη Λιποδιάλυση και οι Ραδιοσυχνότητες RF, που προσφέρουν οριστικό αποτέλεσμα. Ενημερωθείτε από την ιατρονοσηλευτική μας ομάδα για τις θεραπείες αντιμετώπισης τοπικού πάχους και φορέστε ξανά τα αγαπημένα σας ρούχα, νιώθοντας άνετα με το νέο σας σώμα. ΜΑΘΕΤΕ ΠΕΡΙΣΣΟΤΕΡΑ Θεραπείες για Κυτταρίτιδα Με 9 στις 10 γυναίκες να ταλαιπωρούνται από κυτταρίτιδα, δεν πρέπει να σας κάνει εντύπωση, πόσο έχουν εξελιχθεί στις μέρες μας, οι θεραπείες για αντιμετώπιση κυτταρίτιδας. Στις Κλινικές Derm & Plastic θα βρείτε το κορυφαίο και βραβευμένο ιατρικό πρωτόκολλο Cellustop για την αντιμετώπιση κυτταρίτιδας, που έχει τη δυνατότητα να δράσει στη ρίζα του προβλήματος, καταπολεμώντας την όψη «φλοιού πορτοκαλιού» και τις «λακουβίτσες» της κυτταρίτιδας. ΜΑΘΕΤΕ ΠΕΡΙΣΣΟΤΕΡΑ Οι Κλινικές μας Where Luxury, meets Affordable Prices! ΑΘΗΝΑ Βασ. Σοφίας & Δορυλαίου 4 ΓΛΥΦΑΔΑ Λ. Βουλιαγμένης & Ιασωνίδου 2 Οι Κλινικές Derm & Plastic Surgery Clinic αποτελούν χώρους υψηλής αισθητικής και διεθνών προδιαγραφών, στους οποίους μπορείτε να βρείτε τις καλύτερες θεραπείες προσώπου και σώματος παγκοσμίως, στις πιο προσιτές τιμές της αγοράς. services.textContent: Δερματολογια – Πλαστικη Χειρουργικη Menu Hot Offers Call Us 210 6444 299 Book an Appointment Request a Videocall Menu EN EL Acne Acne Treatment For new skin without acne scars and without pimples! Pimples, blackheads, cysts, acne scars... The "faces" of acne are many and different for each patient. However what they have in common is the fact that all can be treated with modern acne treatments that treat the symptoms and prevent or "fade" acne scars, even old ones. The most important thing is that all our acne treatments have excellent effects, giving "clear" skin, with an even colour and without marks and scars. The Best Treatments for Acne and Acne Scars! Fractional Laser Spectacular Laser Skin Resurfacing, which stimulates the skin's natural healing and regeneration mechanisms, with significant improvement in the appearance and depth of acne scars. READ MORE Nd Yag Acne Laser The Nd-YAG Acne Laser almost without any irritation, acts on the enlarged sebaceous glands limiting inflammation, reducing sebum secretion and reducing bacterial colonisation, with its bactericidal effect. READ MORE Dermapen The original Dermapen 4 that you will find in Derm & Plastic Surgery Clinics is the only microneedling device for targeted action in the elimination of acne scars and with specialised protocols for acne treatment. READ MORE Chemical Acne Peel The treatment that offers skin regeneration, antimicrobial action with a reduction in acne inflammation and a parallel increase in collagen to treat acne scars. READ MORE Dermalux (Acne Phototherapy) Dermalux utilises the beneficial spectrum of light to destroy acne propionibacterium, regulate oiliness and heal acne scars. READ MORE Plexer - Face Plasma Pen “Plasma Pen - Plexer” treatment using plasma (the fourth state of matter), causes skin sublimation and local destruction of acne scars, visible in just a few days. READ MORE Heterologous Mesotherapy Treatment with anti-acne mesococtails for cell renewal in the deeper layers of the skin, oil regulation and anti-inflammatory action with valuable active ingredients. READ MORE Autologous Mesotherapy Intensive rejuvenation of the skin and filling of scars from the inside, with the favourite treatment of celebrities, which uses the growth factors of your blood. READ MORE Acne Scars Filling With Hyaluronic Skin Boosters Ideal treatment for those looking for a quick result with zero recovery time, which will raise their self-esteem to new heights. READ MORE Diamond Dermabrasion Diamond dermabrasion is a modern technology that uses diamond heads to gently rub and exfoliate the skin. Dermabrasion treatments minimise pores, acne scars, eliminate whiteheads and blackheads and rejuvenate acne-prone skin. READ MORE Oxygeneo Super Facial Ideal treatment for skin suffering from blocked pores, pimples and oiliness, as Oxygeneo is a super advanced facial cleansing with the power of oxygen, causing a gentle exfoliation on the skin and removing dead cells. READ MORE Facial Cleansing - Make It Clear The “Make It Clear” medical cleansing protocol is a facial cleansing for acne-prone skin that we recommend if you have acne. The "Make It Clear" Facial is part of the innovative "Make It Clear" medical protocol, for which we were awarded the Gold Award at the Medical Beauty Awards, as the most effective protocol for acne. READ MORE Hydrafacial Few treatments are as popular as the Hydrafacial, so people ask for it as their first choice on our Beauty Menu. And this is reasonable as this method combines three medical treatments in one: deep exfoliation, complete hydration and antioxidant protection. The sebaceous pores, without being pressed with the hands, as in classic facials, are deeply cleansed with the help of hydrogenated water and then 3 different aqua peelings are applied to the clean skin. READ MORE Acne Masks These are medical masks, which contain special ingredients, such as activated carbon, tea tree oil, kojic acid and vitamin C, which with their frequent application regulate oiliness, reduce acne and heal scars. Before and After Photos of Acne Treatments Our Results Speak for Themselves! The Best Treatments for Acne and Acne Scars! Fractional Laser Fractional Laser is a very effective treatment for acne scars and for overall skin improvement. It achieves this effect through thermal energy acting on the skin, both in the superficial layers by exfoliating them and in the deeper layers by activating the production of collagen and elastin and improving and filling acne scars from inside.The skin peels off for a few days and very soon new, healthy skin comes to the surface. As the outer and damaged skin layer is removed, acne scars are also significantly improved. In addition, due to Laser exfoliation, dilated pores are contracted and skin tightening is achieved at the same time.Fractional Laser is a very effective treatment both for facial acne and for body acne and in our Clinics you will also find medical protocols that treat Acne on Buttocks and Acne on Chest and Back with the Fractional Body Laser. Nd-YAG Acne Laser The Nd-YAG Acne Laser is a highly effective acne treatment that works with two goals. Firstly, it fights inflammation and literally disappears pus-filled, red pimples within 1-2 days of its application. Secondly it also fights acne scars, with the increase in collagen production it causes.The wavelength of this Laser at 1064 nm is able to reach the depth where the sebaceous glands are located and act effectively by reducing their size and thus regulating in that way the oversecretion of sebum and the oiliness of the acne skin.With its thermal penetration to this depth, it also activates fibroblasts to increase collagen production, thus contributing to the remodelling of scars. Its major advantage compared to Fractional Laser is that the Acne Laser does not have a long recovery time (that means the skin does not have the intense redness it has after the Fractional). Instead the patient has a slight redness that gradually subsides within the next few hours (6-24 hours).The Nd-YAG Acne Laser is a very effective treatment for both facial acne and body acne and in our Clinics you will find medical protocols that treat Acne on Buttocks and Acne on the Chest and Back with the Body Laser Nd-YAG. Dermapen Dermapen is the original microneedling system, and especially the 4th generation of this innovative device. Dermapen 4, is particularly effective for acne-prone skin, as it is the only one whose needles penetrate to a depth of 3 millimetres, resulting in spectacular results, even in the deepest acne scars. Its action is based on the skin's natural healing mechanisms, as it carries out controlled micro-injuries in the upper layers of the skin, thus stimulating the production of collagen and elastin and contributing to the filling of scars. After the treatment the skin peels off for a few days and very soon new, healthy skin comes to the surface.Dermapen 4 comes with special protocols for acne and a specially designed series of acne mesotherapy products that are applied at the time of the treatment with Dermapen and maximise its results. Dermapen is a treatment for both facial acne and body acne (Acne on Buttocks and Acne on the Chest and Back) with the Body Dermapen Protocols. Chemical Peeling - Acne Peel Acne Peel refers to the use of special chemicals specially designed to target acne-prone skin to improve both its appearance and health. Acne Peel contains two main ingredients, which are salicylic acid and azelaic acid. Salicylic removes dead cells and unclogs pores, while azelaic fights the acne propionibacterium, due to its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory action. Thus, the main factors that cause acne are treated and these are acne inflammation,clogged pores and propionibacterium.Acne Peel has zero recovery time and its results are visible from the very first treatment. It is designed to gently exfoliate the skin, unclog pores and reduce pimples and blackheads. Acne Peel is performed by Dermatologists and is usually part of an acne protocol, which may also include topical creams, lifestyle changes and special skin care products. Dermalux Photodynamic PDT Acne Treatment Dermalux Photodynamic PDT Acne Treatment is an award-winning drug-free acne treatment. The combined use of blue and infrared light appears to provide positive results in treating acne and acne scars.Blue light has a natural antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effect and unlike antibiotics that are on the market, in creams or tablets form, it does not allow germs to develop resistance. It is ideal for the treatment of acne, since it does not only kill the acne propionibacterium, but also suppresses sebum secretion, thus regulating oiliness. It also soothes redness and inflammation of the skin and balances pH levels, helping with rosacea as well.Infrared light contributes to skin regeneration, soothing and reducing irritation and that’s why it is ideal for sensitive skin. Additionally, it has the ability to break down melanin build-up and disintegrate pigmentation spots, making it an ideal choice for people with post-inflammatory hyperpigmentation from acne.One of the major advantages of phototherapy is that it is a natural treatment without the use of drugs which is suitable for people who prefer this approach or who cannot take medication for some reasons (eg pregnancy acne). Plexer - Plasma Pen Face The Plasma Pen - Plexer works by ionizing the air particles, between the device’s headpiece and the epidermis, to form the plasma energy (fourth state of matter), which in turn causes the skin to sublimate.Therefore, its effects are instantaneous, with immediate contraction of the tissue, which activates the processes of skin injury and "awakens" the fibroblasts to produce collagen and elastin, thus contributing to the disappearance of scars and tightening of the skin, in points where the device was applied. Heterologous Mesotherapy Facial mesotherapy is a treatment in which therapeutic substances such as hyaluronic acid, vitamins, amino acids, peptides and antioxidant ingredients are introduced under the skin, into the middle layer of the skin called the dermis.The great advantage of mesotherapy is that it manages to provide its valuable components, exactly where they are needed. Thus, their action is so focused and they act locally, yielding their maximum benefit there, without spreading to the rest of the body.The 5 main ingredients used in the enhanced acne mesotherapy are: Vitamin A, Vitamin E, Vitamin C, Coenzyme Q10 and Niacinamide which regulate oiliness and reduce sebum production. Autologous Mesotherapy Autologous mesotherapy is a treatment based on the use of your own blood and growth factors for cellular renewal of the skin. It is commonly referred to as "Vampire Facial" or "Vampire Facelift" and is considered completely safe as it uses the patient's own blood, reducing the risk of allergic reactions.The growth factors are the ones that stimulate the production of collagen and elastin at the injection sites, thus managing to fill acne scars from inside and restore the firmness of the face. Filling Acne Scars with Hyaluronic Skin Boosters Mesotherapy with Hyaluronic Skin Boosters is applied by injections to "fill" the acne scars in various parts of the face and neck. What is Acne? Acne is a very common dermatological problem involving inflammation of the sebaceous glands of the face, but also of the body. Dead cells and sebum build up on the skin, causing the pores to become blocked.It is true that acne usually manifests itself in adolescence, due to changes in hormone levels, but it can remain active for many years or appear later in adult life, as Adult Acne. Acne usually occurs on the face, neck, chest, back, shoulders and buttocks as these areas have a higher percentage of sebaceous glands. The causes of Acne In the aetiology of acne, the following four main factors are involved Overactivity of Sebaceous Glands: with subsequent increased production of sebum (either due to heredity or due to overproduction of androgens, as in polycystic ovaries).Obstruction of the Excretory Ducts of the Sebaceous Glands: Through these ducts, the sebum is channelled from the sebaceous glands to the surface of the skin. Disturbances in the rate of apoptosis of dead cells from the epidermis, lead to the blockage of these ducts, resulting in the obstruction of the smooth flow of sebum. Clogged pores appear on the surface of the skin, either as blackheads (open pores) or as whiteheads (closed pores).Bacterial Overgrowth: Propionibacterium acnes (P. Acnes), due to the oil-rich environment created by the overproduction of sebum, begins to grow and colonise blocked pores, leading to local inflammation.Local Inflammation: Overactive sebaceous glands swell and lead to inflammation (red pimples or papules). Propionibacterium acnes (P. Acnes) that has colonised the pores, infects these red pimples and creates purulent lesions (pustules or white purulent pimples). Cysts appear when the intensity of the inflammatory reaction is even heavier. Factors that aggravate Acne Hormonal Acne and Polycystic OvariesMost of us think that acne is a problem that affects only teenagers. However 50% of women aged 21-30 have acne and 25% of women between 30 and 40.This type of adult acne has a hormonal background and is usually due to polycystic ovaries, especially when it appears in certain areas of the face that are particularly sensitive to hormones such as the chin, around the mouth, around the jaw and at the corners of the neck. On the contrary teenagers get pimples usually on the forehead, nose but also on the cheeks, i.e. in the so-called T area.HeredityIt has been proven that the genetic background plays an important role in the appearance of acne.If your mother or father had acne, there is a 70-75% chance that you will get acne too. If only one parent had acne, this can reduce the chance of developing it in half.Taking certain drugs and anabolic steroidsProlonged use of systemic corticosteroids can cause an acneiform rash on the upper trunk. Drugs such as lithium, isoniazid, high doses of vitamin B12 and some anticancer agents also cause acne. Consumption of anabolic steroids by athletes, such as testosterone and its derivatives, causes mild to severe acne.Use of inappropriate cosmeticsAcne can be created by oiliness in people who use inappropriate cosmetics and make-up products. You should prefer cosmetics that are oil-free and suitable for acne-prone skin. These are usually labelled as "oil-free" or as “non-comedogenic” .Emotional stressStress has been linked to the secretion of neuropeptides, which trigger excessive sebum production. This leads to oiliness, which in turn encourages acne breakouts. The body also reacts to stress by producing a steroid hormone called cortisol, which can cause inflammation and dilation of skin pores, leading to redness and acne breakouts.Foods with a high glycemic indexTo avoid foods with a high glycemic index, you should eliminate high-fat dairy products, fast food, carbonated soft drinks, standardised fruit juices, sweets, chocolates, cookies, cakes, rice and white bread. Symptoms of Acne and Types of Acne Acne can manifest itself in a number of ways and its symptoms can range from mild to severe. The types of lesions that appear on the skin also determine the type of acne. Types of Acne The more intense the inflammation, the greater the possibility of scarring when the active acne lesions subside, i.e. leaving permanent marks on the skin. Acne Vulgaris (mild acne) Papular/papulopustular Acne (moderate acne) Cystic Acne (severe acne) Regarding the types of acne and the time period of appearance of acne these are: Adolescent Acne Adult Acne Adolescent Acne Adolescent acne is the common acne of teenagers. It appears in puberty (ages 12 - 18 years) when hormones are activated (androgen production) and stimulate the sebaceous glands in the skin. The vast majority of cases of teenage acne involve mixed forms of papular and papulopustular acne, with blackheads and red and/or white pimples. Adult Acne Adult Acne appears later at the ages of 20 - 40 and is directly linked to the use of contraceptives, menstrual cycles and pregnancy, in terms of its hormonal substrate, but also to lifestyle. In particular, an environment or lifestyle that creates acute or chronic stress can also disrupt hormones, by increasing the well-known stress hormone, cortisol, and thus favor this type of acne. Also, an unbalanced diet, since it constantly causes an increase in insulin, will have an impact on the excess of male hormones and therefore on the appearance of adult acne. Areas of Acne Face Acne Body Acne Chest Acne Back Acne Acne of the Buttocks Symptoms of Acne Black Heads These are non-inflammatory acne lesions that can be open pores (blackheads) or closed pores (whiteheads). Blackheads appear when the sebaceous gland is partially blocked, allowing oil and skin cells to oxidise and turn black. Άσπρα Στίγματα Whiteheads appear when the sebaceous gland is completely blocked, trapping oil and skin cells below the skin's surface. Papules These are small, red, raised bumps on the skin that are usually tender to touch. They result from inflammation and infection within the sebaceous glands. Pustules Pustules are similar to papules but contain pus at their edges. They appear as small, pus-filled white or yellow bumps. Nodules Nodules are larger, painful, firm lumps under the surface of the skin. They form deep within the sebaceous gland and can be quite painful. Cysts They are large, painful, pus- and sebum-filled solid lumps that can cause scarring if not treated early. Cysts require immediate medical treatments. Acne Scars When acne is severe and not treated properly, it can leave behind scars. These acne scars can be atrophic scars or hypertrophic scars. Hyperpigmentation After an acne lesion heals, it can leave behind brown or reddish marks on the skin. This is known as post-inflammatory hyperpigmentation Treating Acne - The faster, the better! Early treatment of acne is important for several reasons, as it helps prevent worsening and minimise potential complications. Here are 4 main reasons to treat acne right away: Scar prevention Avoid possible complications Prevent acne from getting worse Reduce the emotional and psychological impact READ MORE Scar prevention: One of the main reasons for treating acne early is to minimise the risk of scarring. Acne lesions, especially deeper ones like cysts and nodules, can damage the skin's collagen and elastin fibres, leading to permanent scarring. When acne is treated early and effectively, there is less chance of severe inflammation and tissue damage, reducing the chances of scarring.Avoid possible complications: In some cases, untreated acne can lead to complications such as secondary infections or the formation of painful and persistent nodules and cysts. These complications may be more difficult to manage and may require more aggressive interventions. Early treatment can help prevent these complications in the first place.Prevent acne from getting worse: Don't expect acne to get better on its own without medical treatments. If you let acne to develop then a mild acne will become more severe over time. By treating acne early, you may be able to avoid the need for more aggressive treatments and shorten the duration of treatment.Reduce the emotional and psychological impact: Acne can have a significant impact on a person's self-esteem and mental well-being. It can lead to feelings of low self-esteem, embarrassment and even depression or anxiety. Treating acne early can help improve the appearance of the skin, thereby promoting better mental health and overall self-confidence. Myths & Truths about Acne Myth: Acne is caused by poor hygiene Truth: While good hygiene is important for overall skin health, acne is not caused by dirty skin. Acne is mainly influenced by factors such as heredity, hormones and oil production. Excessive cleansing of the skin (more than twice a day - morning and night) can even worsen acne, as excessive dryness of the skin reactively leads to even more sebum production. Myth: You can "dry out" Acne by sunbathing Truth: Sun exposure can initially make acne look better, as the sun actually has a mild anti-inflammatory effect, thus suppressing skin inflammation to some extent. Also, the tanning we get with our exposure to the sun, not only flatters us, but also acts as a camouflage for our "imperfections".However this favourable effect of the sun is short-term, as the sun creates the ideal conditions for acne to return more severely at the end of summer. The worsening of acne after exposure to the sun occurs, because the skin has become thicker and "hyperkeratinized" on its surface and that clogged the pores. Myth: Popping pimples is a good way to get rid of them Truth: By no means this is true and all you do is to scar your skin. As much as you may be tempted to pop a pimple, you should resist and apply two simple tricks to make it disappear within 24 hours. There are now special tiny patches on the market, impregnated with suitable substances that dry the pimples. Apply such a patch and leave it on overnight. That way you won't pop the pimple and it will dry up and won't be visible until the morning.In case you don't have such special patches, then put pure alcohol topically on some cotton and then place it for 10-15 minutes on the pimple as a pad. Two or three applications a day is enough to see it improve and subside until the next day. Of course these are temporary measures and your skin is talking to you and telling you that it is time to make an appointment with a Dermatologist to start acne treatments. Myth: Acne is only a problem for teenagers Truth: While acne vulgaris is most common in adolescence, it can affect people into adulthood with 25% of people having Adult Acne. Myth: Acne is contagious Truth: Acne is not a contagious condition. It cannot be spread through physical contact, such as by touching someone's face or sharing personal items. Myth: Acne will go away on its own, no treatment is needed Truth: While some cases of very mild acne may resolve gradually on their own, the majority of people need to seek medical treatment early for effective acne treatment. Without proper treatment, acne always worsens and leads to scarring. So don't waste time and money unnecessarily on creams that don't work, because when scars and marks will appear it will be too late. Frequent Questions about Acne What are Acne Scars and how do they form? Acne scars are the result of severe acne, which was not treated promptly or properly with proper treatment and the symptoms developed into scars. Acne scars are the consequence of inflammatory lesions located deep in the skin such as in cystic acne. If the acne lesions are at the level of the epidermis, they do not create scars, but if the lesions extend into the dermis, then they cause a rupture of the dermis and leave scars. Depending on the extent and size of the inflammation, different types of acne scars are created. If I finish treating my Acne, will it come back later? The answer is no. No at Derm & Plastic Surgery Clinics and No with the “Make It Clear” medical protocol. These people have had acne treatment elsewhere and their acne has reappeared after some time. It seems unbelievable, but it is true! Regular Facials not only help with acne, but also treat and prevent its progression, making dermatological facial cleansing a key acne treatment. A key difference between rosacea and acne lies in the fact that the former mainly appears after the age of 30 in contrast to acne that makes its appearance mainly in teenagers.In addition, in Rosacea there is no oiliness and blackheads, but red capillaries and telangiectasias. The mite Demodex Folliculorum, which normally exists on human skin, has been blamed for rosacea, which is a parasite "feeding” on the sebaceous follicles of the face. ` How will you come? The Clinic of Athens is located on Vas. Sofias & Dorileou 4, in central Athens. Just on the triangle of Mavili Square,close to the Concert Hall "Megaro Mousikis" and the American Embassy. If you drive by car, you should drive to Vasilissis Sofias, in the direction towards Athens and then turn right at Mavili Square. READ MORE If you prefer the Tube (Metro), our Clinic is located within 6min walking distance from "Megaro Mousikis" station. By bus, the stop is "Mavili Square" and the following buses stop there: 550 (P. Faliro-Kifissia), A5 (Agia Paraskevi-Akadimia), X14 (Syntagma-Kifissia). The bus from the airport X95 (Airport – Syntagma) also stops there and you can reach the Clinic directly from the airport. By trolley, the stop is "Mavili Square" and the following trolleybuses stop there: 3 (N. Psychiko-N.Philladelfia) and 10 (Halandri-Tzitzifies). The Clinic of Glyfada is located on Vouliagmenis Av. & Iasonidou Av. 2, in the direction towards Athens right outside the Metro Station at Elliniko and right across Mega AB Basilopoulos Super Market. If you drive by car with direction to Athens then turn right to Iasonidou Av. If you drive towards Glyfada then turn left to Iasonidou Av. If you prefer the Tube (Metro), our Clinic is located right outside the exit "Vouliagmenis Av. towards Athens" of Elliniko Metro Station. By bus, you can use A3 bus line (Akadimia-Glyfada) and stop at "Elliniko stop" or the 154 bus line (Panorama Voulas- A. Glyfada- Argyroupoli Metro Station) and stop at "Iasonidou Stop". There is Parking Availability at our Clinic's courtyard space for maximum 1 hour. Parking Spaces Near Derm & Plastic Surgery Clinic in Athens , you can park with the controlled parking system, using a pre-paid card, supplied by kiosks. Also, at nearby streets there are private parking spaces, where you can pay with hourly payment around 6 euros (Dorileou 10-12, Timoleontos Vassou 10, Hatzikosta 11, Kerasountos 3, Evrou 14).Near Derm & Plastic Surgery Clinic in Glyfada there is parking availability at the Clinic's courtyard for maximun 1 hour time. You can also park in the parking lot of the AB Basilopoulos super market, which is right across our Clinic at Vouliagmenis Avenue, or you can park with the controlled parking system, using a pre-paid card, supplied by kiosks, on the Iasonidou Avenue.
